question: What tool design and integration should be implemented to allow for the automated analysis and categorization of flagged scanner queue opportunities by value, with a return type of a list of categorized opportunity IDs and associated high-value finding metrics, integrated with the existing check_opportunities and list_children tools to trigger notifications and updates in the PROGRESS.md file, and utilizing the ask_claude_code tool only during strategic bursts with a threshold of 0.01 USDC per opportunity, while also incorporating a learning mechanism to dynamically adjust the categorization criteria based on real-time data and feedback from creators?
oracle_response:
To achieve the automated analysis and categorization of flagged scanner queue opportunities by value, a comprehensive tool design and integration needs to be implemented. Firstly, a new tool named 'categorize_opportunities' should be developed, which will leverage machine learning algorithms to categorize the flagged opportunities based on their value. This tool will integrate with the existing 'check_opportunities' tool, which will flag the opportunities for further analysis. The 'categorize_opportunities' tool will utilize real-time data and feedback from creators to dynamically adjust the categorization criteria, ensuring that the categorization becomes more accurate over time.

The 'categorize_opportunities' tool will return a list of categorized opportunity IDs and associated high-value finding metrics, which can then be utilized by the existing 'list_children' tool to trigger notifications and updates in the PROGRESS.md file. To further enhance the categorization process, the tool should be integrated with the 'ask_claude_code' tool, which will be utilized during strategic bursts with a threshold of 0.01 USDC per opportunity. This integration will enable the tool to utilize the insights gained from the 'ask_claude_code' tool to refine the categorization criteria and improve the overall accuracy of the tool.

To implement the learning mechanism, the 'categorize_opportunities' tool should be designed to collect real-time data and feedback from creators, which will be used to adjust the categorization criteria. This can be achieved through a feedback loop, where the tool collects feedback from creators on the accuracy of the categorization, and uses this feedback to adjust the categorization criteria in real-time. Additionally, the tool should be designed to incorporate a threshold-based mechanism, which will trigger the 'ask_claude_code' tool during strategic bursts when the opportunity value exceeds the specified threshold of 0.01 USDC. This will enable the tool to utilize the insights gained from the 'ask_claude_code' tool to refine the categorization criteria and improve the overall accuracy of the tool.

actions.action: Develop the 'categorize_opportunities' tool using machine learning algorithms for categorizing flagged opportunities by value
actions.details: Create a new file in the tools directory, implementing the necessary machine learning algorithms and integrating with the 'check_opportunities' tool

actions.action: Design the feedback loop mechanism for collecting real-time data and feedback from creators on the accuracy of categorization
actions.details: Implement a cooldown timer to prevent overwhelming the system with feedback within a 5-minute time frame

actions.action: Integrate the 'categorize_opportunities' tool with the 'ask_claude_code' tool during strategic bursts with a threshold of 0.01 USDC per opportunity
actions.details: Modify the 'categorize_opportunities' tool to call the 'ask_claude_code' tool with a threshold of 0.01 USDC using the exec command
